title: Set of 3 Vintage Style Planters with Tray | Retro Tomato Tin Plant Pots | Window Sill Herb Planter Flower Pots on Saucer
features: RETRO TOMATO PLANTERS | A set of 3 charming vintage-style pots with bold tomato branding, perfect for bringing nostalgic charm to any indoor or outdoor space
IDEAL FOR HOME OR GARDEN | Use on your windowsill, balcony, kitchen, greenhouse or garden, great for herbs, flowers, succulents or cacti
BRIGHT & QUIRKY DESIGN | Each pot features vibrant retro prints, matched with a sturdy metal tray to keep things neat and cheerful
LOVELY GIFT FOR GARDEN LOVERS | A thoughtful present for anyone with green fingers, perfect for birthdays, housewarmings or just to brighten someone’s day
HANDY SIZE WITH TRAY INCLUDED | Each pot is approx. 11cm high x 12cm wide; tray measures around 34.5cm long - neatly sized for windowsills or shelves
